feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Mensagem de advertência/erro na emissão de Ordem de Manutenção do Plano
entry.content: Programar e gerar Ordem de Manutenção do Plano de Manutenção, utilizando a transação IP10, aparece mensagem de erro em alguns planos de manutenção. Como exemplo, plano de de manutenção 12493, que aparece mensagem de advertência/erro (FINS_ACDOC_PLANNING)

entry.title: IEE2E practice system, unit 4 copy GL exercise
entry.content:
I cannot copy a GL account due to apparent authorization issue. This happens in the IEE2E (E2E business processes in S4PC) Unit 4, exercise 3. instructions indicate to copy GL 6510000 to GL 6510###. error message indicates "you are not authorized to create GL in YCOA. There are 2 different places to do this copy activity and same error message each time.  I know of a couple others in this practice system with same issue.  Any ideas?

I did reconfirm that the role noted in unit 4, exercise 1 "BR_GL_ACCOUNTANT" was in fact added to my account.

entry.title: RCATSTPS performance improvement
entry.content:
What are the options to improve the performance of program RCATSTPS? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: 周期実行結果の問題
entry.content:
実績配賦実行(KSU5)の実行結果ログに関して2点問題があります。添付資料参照

１．表示金額が100分の1になっている。

２．周期を2つ入力し実行すると2つ目の実行結果が周期の設定とは違っている。

entry.title: Clarification Required – Customer 360° View (Version 2)
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Kindly let us know the time period for which the "Recent Business Documents" and "Recent Deliveries" are displayed in overview section in the tile "Customer 360° View (Version 2)". Additionally, please confirm whether this time duration is configurable. If yes, we request you to share the relevant settings or configuration details to modify the same.

Your support in this regard will be highly appreciated.

entry.title: PO Creation Error
entry.content:
We are creating a Asset PO with Import document type, and when we we are entering the Value - 21707000 in the line item for 1 qty, with order unit-EA, system showing the below error.

Currency - JPY


Entry too long (enter in the format _,___,__~.____)

Message No. 00089

If it is not possible in the standard, please suggest workaround solution

Thank you

entry.title: STO Creation Error – No master record exists for supplier XXXX
entry.content: While creating Stock Transport Orders (STO), system throws error: 'No master record exists for supplier XXXX' (Message No. 06101). Issue is occurring for all plants when determined as vendors

entry.title: Assey not updated
entry.content:
Hi Support , 

After result recording from QE51n, results are not updated into as Batch Charactarsics. 

Refer the attached file.

entry.title: S/4HANA 2025 Fiori: Duplicate tiles in Space and missing transport option in Launchpad App
entry.content:
• Scenario: We have created two separate catalogs linked to the same Space: one catalog for "Display/Read" access and another for "Edit/Create" access.

  • Problem: For testing, a user was assigned only the "Edit/Create" role/catalog. The expectation was that only edit-related tiles would appear. However, the user is also seeing duplicate tiles originating from the unassigned "Display/Read" catalog within that shared space.

Issue 2: When creating or modifying Spaces and Pages via the Launchpad layout tools, the prompt/option to capture the changes in a transport request is missing from the screen.

entry.title: Custom copy description program between languages
entry.content:
When a Cost Center is created in one logon language (e.g., English), the description entered is only stored for that language. When users log on in a different language (e.g., Spanish), the Cost Center description field appears empty.
The Cost Center description should either be replicated across all active languages.
Is this behavior covered by standard SAP functionality (e.g., via automatic language replication or a configuration parameter)? If not, please confirm whether a custom development (Z-program) is required to address this gap.

entry.title: Are SAP BTP, SAP Build, Generative AI Hub and SAP HANA Cloud restricted to RISE with SAP customers,
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'd like to clarify the licensing eligibility for several SAP cloud products and would appreciate input from the community (and ideally from SAP colleagues with a licensing background).

Context: We are advising a customer who currently runs SAP S/4HANA on-premise (no RISE with SAP contract, no S/4HANA Cloud Private/Public Edition). The customer is interested in adopting the following services:

  • SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP)
  • SAP Build (Apps / Process Automation / Work Zone)
  • SAP Generative AI Hub (within SAP AI Core)
  • SAP HANA Cloud

My questions:

  1. Are any of these products contractually restricted to RISE with SAP customers, or can a pure on-premise customer subscribe to them directly (e.g., via CPEA, Pay-As-You-Go, or Subscription model)?
  2. Which capabilities are only included as part of the RISE with SAP Premium Plus package, and which can be purchased standalone regardless of the ERP deployment model?
  3. Are there any technical prerequisites or limitations (e.g., required S/4HANA Cloud edition, specific connectivity setup) when consuming Generative AI Hub or HANA Cloud from an on-premise S/4HANA landscape?
  4. Does the answer differ between commercial entitlement (what you can buy) and functional integration scope (what you can actually connect to your on-premise system)?

Any pointers to official SAP documentation, product availability matrices, or licensing guides would be highly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Required Indian Currency Display Format in system.
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

We would like to request the Indian currency display format in multiple of our SAP reports and systems, as management requires this functionality. 

Currently, the report is displaying values in a format that does not align with the standard Indian numbering system. For example, in India, amounts are generally displayed using the lakh and crore format (e.g., 1,00,000 and 1,00,00,000), whereas the report is displaying values in the international format.

We would like to understand:

  1. Whether SAP standard functionality supports displaying currency values in the Indian numbering format.
  2. If yes, what configuration or settings are required to enable this functionality?
  3. If not supported in standard SAP, whether any SAP Notes, enhancements, or alternative solutions are available.

Please review and advise on the standard behaviour and the available options.

Thank you for your support.

Regards,
Shakeel Sheikh

entry.title: Change log activation on VBEP table
entry.content:
In our system, change documents are activated for the relevant sales document objects, and we are able to see change history for several schedule line fields. However, changes made to VBEP-WMENG are not appearing in the sales document change log (VA33/VA32 → Environment → Changes), even though the quantity is being updated

Could you please advise:

1. Whether standard SAP supports change document logging for field VBEP-WMENG.
2. If any additional configuration, table logging, or enhancement is required to record changes to this field.
3. Whether there are any known restrictions when the quantity is updated via EDI processing, scheduling agreement releases, BAPIs, IDocs, or custom programs.
4. How we can verify if the field is included in the corresponding change document object and change document generation logic.

entry.title: Help on ra cost
entry.content:
Help on RA Costs on CJE0
Hi,
 
I need some help on understanding how the RA costs are build up on
transaction CJE0.
 
For example, looking at V.006010 the RA costs is 572,601.05, but on GR55
there is no cost recorded (See both screenshots attached). Where does
the value come from on CJE0 and why is it not coming through on GR55?
 
Many thanks in advance for your help.

entry.title: RFZALI20 schließt keine stornierten Belege aus
entry.content:
Wir haben einen Zahllauf durchgeführt.

Zahlungsvorschlag: 15.06.2026

Zahlungslauf: 16.06.2026

Der Zahlungsträger wurde am 19.06.2026 erstellt.

 

Nach dem Zahlungslauf am 16.06 wurde jedoch ein Zahlbeleg storniert.

In der Zahlungsträger-Datei ist dieser auch nicht enthalten (das ist korrekt).

Jedoch in der Zahlungsliste des RFZALI20, welche am 19.06.2026 erstellt wurde (das ist falsch).

entry.title: Real time Consumption in sub contracting SAP document
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We will need to implement a real-time consumption scenario for one of our clients. Could SAP help by providing any relevant documentation, implementation guides, best practices, and use cases where real-time consumption scenarios have been successfully implemented?

It would be helpful to understand the supported business scenarios, architecture recommendations, prerequisites, limitations, and any reference implementations that can assist us during the design and implementation phases.

Looking forward to your guidance and supporting materials.

Thanks and Regards,

entry.title: Integrate SAP S/4HANA on-premises with ActiveMQ on-premises using Edge Integration Cell
entry.content:
Hi,

We work with a private on-premises version of SAP S/4HANA and we would like to exchange events between that instance and some ActiveMQ queues (on-premises too).

The condition is that the messages/events stay on-premises and don't go outside on any hyperscalers' infrastructure.

We have a Kubernetes infrastructure on-premises too.

It seems that with such landscape it should be possible to configure a runtime with Edge Integration Cell on-premises, add a JSM or AMQP Adapter in the design of the intregration and then exchange events between the EIC and SAP S/4HANA.

Is it correct ?

Thanks

entry.title: clearing code to get generated in the bank format YFR_CGI_XML_CT for a creditor having Ireland bank
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a question, is it normal for the bank format YFR_CGI_XML_CT to generate a clearing code for bank country Irelande of the creditor. Is there any new version of bank format YFR_CGI_XML_CT that needs to be implemented to cater for this?

 

Kind regards,Virashma

entry.title: We are experiencing an issue regarding batch classification validation in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public
entry.content:
Dear Support Team,

We are experiencing an issue regarding batch classification validation in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition.

Current Configuration:

  1. We have created a characteristic and flagged it as a Required Entry.
  2. This characteristic is assigned to a Batch Class (Class Type 023), where it is also marked as a Required Entry (Class Overwrite).
  3. The Batch Class is assigned to the Material Master record.

The Issue:
When creating a Production Order (CO01) and generating a batch under the Goods Receipt tab, the standard Batch Classification dialog pop-up appears as expected. However, the system allows the user to completely bypass the mandatory characteristic entry. The user can close the pop-up or process past it without entering a value, and the system saves the production order.

Since the characteristic is explicitly flagged as a Required Entry, the system should enforce a hard block (Error) rather than a by passable Information.

We have also tested the scenario in CO11N. However, the system behavior remains the same.

Our Questions:

  1. Is there any standard configuration available in the Public Cloud edition to enforce a hard validation error for incomplete batch classification during order creation/release?
  2. If this is standard behaviour at the order creation stage, could you please provide the exact technical name of the cloud-ready BAdI (Business Add-In) or Enhancement Spot available to validate batch classification data upon saving the production order?

I have attached screenshots of our characteristic/class configuration and the order creation screen for your reference.

 

Regards, 

Shubham

entry.title: CK11N Picking Negative Procurement Price from Info Record (No PO Involved)
entry.content:
While executing cost estimate using CK11N, the system is determining a negative procurement price for a material.

  • The system correctly identifies the Purchasing Info Record (no Purchase Order is being picked).
  • However, the calculated price is negative, although:
    • The Info Record shows a positive price in ME13.
    • There is no PO involved in the valuation.
  • Valuation Variant:
    • Strategy: L – Price from Purchasing Info Record
    • Sub-strategy: B – Purchase Order Price via Condition Table
  • latest PO is return PO
